title: Harmonograph Lab
description: A multi-source generative-art studio: layer harmonographs, spirographs, roses, Lissajous, superformula, eight 2D strange attractors, nine real 3D strange attractors (Lorenz, Rössler, Aizawa, Thomas, Halvorsen, Chen, Dadras, Sprott, Lorenz-84 — RK4-integrated and flown around by a drag-to-orbit camera) & L-system fractals (incl. branching plants) with color/blend/glow/kaleidoscope. Render any of them as luminous DENSITY-FIELD nebulae (millions of points splatted into a tone-mapped histogram, with depth-cued volumetric color for the 3D flows), spin them live, pulse and beat-reseed to your mic, and export seamless looping GIF/WebM (from-scratch GIF encoder) or high-res PNG/SVG. Shareable by URL.
